ocr_text:
圓形硯的變化 Diverse Circular Inkstones
三足圓硯 Three-legged round inkstone｜多足圓硯 Multi-legged round inkstone｜辟雍硯 Pi Yong inkstone｜傾斜的硯堂 Tilted inkstone platform｜一字形的硯池 One-character-shaped inkwell｜新月形的硯池 Crescent-shaped inkwell
漢晉流行三足圓硯，南北朝至隋唐時，硯足增加，硯堂圓周逐漸形成一圈凹槽，稱為辟雍硯。辟雍是西周時期貴族子弟的學校，因其為圓形建築，四面環水。
During the Han and Jin dynasties, the three-legged round inkstone became popular. From the Southern and Northern Dynasties to the Sui and Tang dynasties, the number of legs on the inkstone increased, and the inkstone platform gradually formed a circular groove, known as the "Pi Yong inkstone." Pi Yong was a school for aristocratic children during the Western Zhou period, characterized by its circular architecture surrounded by water on all four sides.
宋、元圓形硯的硯底或內凹成弧形或有三矮足，硯堂從斜面而漸平坦，硯池逐漸明顯，並有新月形、一字形等變化。
During the Song and Yuan dynasties, some of the bottoms of circular inkstones had concaves, while others had three short legs. The inkstone platform transitioned from an incline to a gradually flattened surface, and the inkwell became more pronounced. There were also variations such as crescent-shaped and one-character-shaped inkwells.
caption: 介紹圓形硯從漢晉三足圓硯演變到宋元新月形、一字形硯池的原理牆。
notes: 單一原理牆鏡頭平移；左半(三足/多足/辟雍硯)見f01，右半(傾斜硯堂/一字形/新月形硯池)見f07，OCR已合併整面。

ocr_text:
箕形硯 → 風字硯 → 抄手硯　Winnower-shaped Inkstone → Inkstone in the Shape of Chinese Character "Feng (wind)" → Handle Inkstone
硯底 The bottom of inkstone
箕形硯｜Winnower-shaped Inkstone
形狀像農具簸箕而得名，方便貯墨，流行於唐代。
Named for its resemblance to a farming tool called a winnower, the inkstone is convenient for storing ink and was popular during the Tang Dynasty.
風字硯｜Inkstone in the Shape of Chinese Character "Feng (wind)"
特別強調硯側外揚的角度，流行於晚唐五代及宋代，也是明清仿古的樣式。
Characterized by the distinctive outward angle of its sides, the inkstone was popular during the late Tang, Five Dynasties, and Song Dynasty periods. It also became a style imitated during the Ming and Qing Dynasties in the fashion of ancient designs.
抄手硯｜Handle Inkstone
太史硯 Tai Shi inkstone
流行於宋及元代。明、清將高而方正、一字形硯池的抄手硯稱為太史硯，太史原是編載史書、兼管天文曆法等的官名，泛指學識淵博之士。
Popular during the Song and Yuan Dynasties. During the Ming and Qing Dynasties, the tall and square inkwells with one-character-shaped wells on handle inkstones were referred to as "Tai Shi Inkstones." "Tai Shi" originally referred to officials who were responsible for compiling historical records and managing astronomy and calendars, signifying individuals with profound knowledge and scholarship.
caption: 說明硯形從唐代箕形硯、晚唐宋風字硯演變到宋元抄手硯（明清稱太史硯）的原理牆。
notes: 單一原理牆鏡頭平移；箕形硯見f01、風字硯見f04、抄手硯與太史硯見f08，OCR已合併整面。

ocr_text:
多樣化的宋元抄手硯　Diverse Handle Inkstones in the Song and Yuan Dynasties
硯底 The bottom of inkstone｜琴式硯 Qin-shaped inkstone
宋、元代抄手硯，有些硯面略呈梯形，硯底斜面有些呈弧凹，硯尾或有攔水線。
During the Song and Yuan Dynasties, some handle inkstones had slightly trapezoidal surfaces, while the inkstone bottoms had curved or concave inclines, and some inkstones had water-blocking lines at the end.
硯堂有各種造型，硯形不限於方、圓，有琴式硯等樣式，說明硯已從單純的文房用具被賦予審美的價值。
Inkstone platforms come in various designs, and the shape of the inkstone is not limited to square or round; there are styles like the qin-shaped inkstone, among others. This indicates that inkstones have evolved from being mere functional stationery items to being imbued with aesthetic value.
caption: 介紹宋元抄手硯多樣造型，含琴式硯等，說明硯由文房用具走向審美價值的原理牆。
notes: 單一原理牆鏡頭平移；標題與左段見f01，右段(琴式硯+審美價值段)見f07，OCR已合併整面。

ocr_text:
（青銅器分類年代對照牆，依器型分欄、依朝代分列）
器型欄：鼎 DING｜鬲 LI｜甗 YAN｜簋 GUI｜盨 XU｜簠 FU｜敦 DUI｜豆 DOU｜爵 JUE｜斝 JIA｜觥 GONG｜卣 YOU｜盉 HE｜鉦 ZHENG（以及鐘鎛、戈 GE／戟 JI／劍 JIAN／弩 NU 等兵器區）
朝代列：商 SHANG Ca.16th-11th Cent. B.C.E.｜西周 WESTERN CHOU Ca.11th-8th Cent. B.C.E.｜春秋 SPRING & AUTUMN Ca.8th-5th Cent. B.C.E.｜戰國 WARRING STATES Ca.5th-3rd Cent. B.C.E.｜秦漢 CHIN & HAN Ca.3rd Cent. B.C.E.-3rd Cent. C.E.
部分品名與編號：佣祖丁鼎 故銅2341｜齒父己鬲 中銅0035｜父乙甗 故銅2369｜獸面紋簋 中銅0584｜毛公鼎 中銅0651｜叔父丁鬲 中銅0081｜祖丁旅甗 故銅2135｜史頌簋 故銅2387｜樂季獻盨 故銅1941｜蟠虺紋鼎 購銅0208｜鄭鬲 中銅1487｜吐舌夔紋方甗 中銅1529｜鉤曲獸形紋簋 購銅0086｜重環紋盨 故銅1929｜鎏金三犧鼎 中銅1426｜夔紋甗(上層甑部) 故銅2173｜陳侯午簋 中銅0590｜方氏鼎 中銅1882｜雙環耳銅甗 故銅2200｜宗周鐘 故銅2377｜子犯和鐘 購銅0090｜能原鎛 中銅0050｜蟠虺紋鐘 購銅0002｜蟠龍紋鎛 購銅0155｜越王州勾劍 中銅0421｜吳王夫差矛 湖北省博物館｜蔡侯產戈 中銅0420｜成周戈 中銅0149｜侯戟 中銅0160｜鈴首曲柄短劍 故銅2326｜鏤空蟠虺紋柄劍 購銅0024｜錯銀弩機 購銅0212｜康侯斧 北京故宮博物院｜安平相邦戈 購銅0172
caption: 故宮青銅器依器型（鼎鬲甗簋…爵斝觥卣，及鐘鎛戈戟劍矛弩）與朝代（商至秦漢）排列的大型分類對照牆。
notes: 36幀為單一大型分類牆的長鏡頭平移，非個別展品；同一綠底版面貫穿食器→酒器→鐘鎛→兵器區。f12為拍攝者/路人模糊幀（純剪輯素材）。f03為最清楚的建立鏡頭（鼎鬲甗簋表頭+五朝代列+編號可讀）；兵器/編鐘細節另見f15、f18、f21、f24、f30、f36。品名與編號因平移與失焦僅能部分辨識，未列盡。
